programme.title: Dahil Mahal Na Mahal Kita
programme.desc: Mela, a popular girl, develops feelings for a naive boy, Miguel. However, once the intimacy wears off, the two are left to cope with misunderstandings, arguments and bitterness.

programme.title: One More Try
programme.desc: After her son becomes critically ill, Grace (Angel Locsin) seeks help from his successful father, whose new wife encourages him to help -- until all treatments fail, leaving no options but to produce a biological sibling.

programme.title: Mamarazzi
programme.desc: The owner (Eugene Domingo) of a small funeral parlor continually meddles in the affairs of her three children.

programme.title: Tres
programme.desc: An agent realizes someone in his task force is a traitor.

programme.title: SupahPapalicious
programme.desc: A man has to win over his girlfriend's son to be able to court her. The son decides that the man who becomes his father should have a large family; the man's friends help him as his multicultural family.

programme.title: Pansamantagal
programme.desc: Two middle-aged people cross paths in a resort where they hope to clear their minds from their respective relationship woes.

programme.title: Bata Batuta
programme.desc: Dolphy's youngest son, Vandolph, joins showbiz, gains star status.

programme.title: Beauty in a Bottle
programme.desc: Three women struggle to cope with their insecurities and body image as they get caught up in the craze over a new beauty product.

programme.title: Modus
programme.desc: A young detective who values his principles is on a quest to punish the corrupt children of influential officials. Things get personal when his fiancée is abducted by a killer he wants to arrest.

programme.title: My Candidate
programme.desc: Sonny, a promising young politician, works with Billie, a hotshot image consultant, to improve his senate campaign and soon falls in love with her.

programme.title: Feng Shui 2
programme.desc: Lester asks Joy for help in defeating the deadly consequences of the cursed Bagua mirror.

programme.title: Beauty in a Bottle
programme.desc: Three women struggle to cope with their insecurities and body image as they get caught up in the craze over a new beauty product.

programme.title: Ikaw Pa Lang Ang Minahal
programme.desc: Adela, the sheltered daughter of successful Dr. Maximo Sevilla, disappoints her father for failing to qualify for a career in medicine. However, she falls for the charms of striking David, whom her father rejects and she responds poorly to.

programme.title: 24/7 in Love
programme.desc: Jane (Kathryn Bernardo) wants to win tickets to Billy Fernandez's (Daniel Padilla) concert. She interviews several people and hears their love stories to figure out what she would do if the world were about to end.

programme.title: Benigno Saulog
programme.desc: Benigno and Urduja become the enemies of local mining tycoon Don Benito. They decide to join forces to put an end to his tyranny.

programme.title: Mercury Is Mine
programme.desc: Carmen, a middle-aged cook, is about to close down her eatery at the foot of Mt. Arayat, when a white American teenage boy named Mercury approaches her and begs for work in exchange for nothing but shelter.

programme.title: Triptiko
programme.desc: An anthology of three stories featuring a young man facing unfortunate events, a male model struggling with a rare disease and a singer's unmet expectations of her crush.

programme.title: Takbo...Talon...Tili!!!
programme.desc: An anthology of horror shorts revolving around a reanimated corpse of a monster, a cursed mirror, and a mall where toys come alive at night.

programme.title: Must Be... Love
programme.desc: A young woman (Kathryn Bernardo) develops romantic feelings for her best friend (Daniel Padilla), but problems arise when another gal enters the picture.

programme.title: AWOL
programme.desc: Soldier Abel Ibarra takes an unauthorized absence from the military to track down the man who tried to kill him and his family.

programme.title: Petmalu
programme.desc: The relationship between a group of seven good friends and musicians is put to the test when they begin to make their way to fulfilling their dreams.

programme.title: Otlum
programme.desc: Friends challenge each other to stay in a haunted bungalow. Things change when they start to experience supernatural activities.

Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. programme.title: Honest Candidate 2
programme.desc: Joo Sang-sook, who failed to win the Seoul mayoral election by dropping the truth bomb on national television, is suddenly pulled into the spotlight again after rescuing a young man from drowning.

programme.title: It's Okay
programme.desc: The movie follows In-yong, an ever-optimistic girl who loses her mother in a car accident, struggles to stay strong on her own. As she is kicked out because of her overdue rent, she finds support from her teacher, her classmate and a pharmacist friend to overcome hardship.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is upset because her best friend, Deltoid, keeps calling her a monster and running away from her. Noddy decides to investigate and find out why Deltoid's behaving so strangely. He soon discovers that Deltoid has lost all his memories and doesn't recognise any of his friends anymore. It takes all Noddy's powers of deduction and gathering evidence on the WhoWhatWhere Tablet to realise that Deltoid has lost his memory chip! All he has to do now is stop Deltoid trying to trap Smartysaurus long enough to refit the chip and restore his memories. Good luck Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is meant to be giving a baton twirling display at the Town Hall but the stage is covered with sticky stuff. Clockwork Mouse and Carlton can clear up the sticky stuff but Noddy must investigate to find out who was trying to spoil Pat-Pat's show or they might do it again! Using his wwwbook to follow all the clues from polishing day at the Fairy Castle to Fairy Coco swapping the polish for a ribbon, Noddy works out it was Pat-Pat who tried to delay her show. She wanted to practise more! Noddy and Bumpy help Pat-Pat to feel confident about the performance and she gives a great display. Thanks, Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Fuse is heartbroken when his new special toy wash is broken. Right before Revs could have a wash in it too! Noddy decides to investigate and help the little robot find out who has broken it. Using all his investigating skills and collecting evidence with the WhoWhatWhere Tablet Noddy realises that it's his own best beloved car, Revs, who broke the toy wash! Poor Revs thought that if he went through the toy wash he'd miss his special time with Noddy and Bumpy. Noddy finds a way for Revs to enjoy the toy wash AND still has his special playtime with his best friends. Clever Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Everyone in Fable Fields is very worried that a new Dazzle Dragon has appeared in the land. Big Ears says there's no such thing as a Dragon in Toyland so Noddy decides to investigate. All the evidence seems to lead to a dragon – footprints, loud noises and glimpses of shiny scales in the woods but clever Noddy thinks it through and, using his investigating skills of looking and looking again, soon realises that the ‘dragon' isn't a dragon at all! It's the knights out on patrol in their shiny armour and tight formation! Phew! Thanks Noddy!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: One of Tag’s biggest dreams is to be a contestant on her favorite TV game show: The Pawmazing Race, hosted by Kelly Korgi. And now that dream is finally coming true! / The Barker Family continue their quest to become the winners of The Pawmazing Race. But the challenges only get tougher from here on out. programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: Today is Yarn Ball Day, a special day in the cat-filled town of Meowbuquerque. Unfortunately, the bridge leading to the party is broken. programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Turbo must become a hero by saving the city from a menacing tiger beetle, who has challenged him to a race on an insane stunt-filled obstacle course.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: When White Shadow is invited to play a daring sport against his hero, an athletic dung beetle, the crew is worried he doesn't know the game is fixed. // Chet gets taken by a con artist gecko and bets Turbo's shell. When Turbo is challenged, he must go slow to try to beat the gecko at his own game.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: Archibald hits the high seas to help out endangered turtles. It's Archibald to the rescue when the citizens of Crackridge report a series of thefts.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: All the toys are ready to start the exciting DareDale Challenge race, which culminates in the competitors successfully completing the Crystal Memory Game in the DareDale Caves. Before the race can start everyone is disappointed to discover that the Crystal Memory Game has been broken. Whilst Clockwork Mouse gets the game mended, Noddy must investigate who broke the game so that they don't break it again. Using his investigating skills in questioning, gathering evidence on the WhoWhatWhere Tablet and thinking, Noddy discovers that Deltoid accidentally broke the game when he was trying to memorise the crystal sorting sequence. Clever Noddy helps Deltoid remember the sequence by remembering the shapes and they are able to finish the game together. Case Closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: It's the day of the Best Toy Award in Toyland and Fuse is the winner! He's very excited but when his new dressing up eyebrows that he wanted to wear to the ceremony go missing, he's devastated. It's up the Noddy to investigate who has taken the amazing eyebrows so that he can get them back to Fuse before the ceremony starts. When the banner and the cup from the Award Ceremony go missing too the finger of suspicion points at Noddy and he must use all his investigating skills to clear his name and find out who has taken the missing eyebrows and why?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about singing sea shanties in the big Pirate Party in Toyland. But when Scurvy the Parrot arrives at Toy Green all on his own Noddy soon realises that the pirates are missing. Where can they have gone? Noddy uses his best investigating skills of tracking, listening, looking and thinking to follow the clues and find out what's happened to the pirates - not helped by a loudly squawking Scurvy! When he discovers that the pirates have lost their voices from over-practising their new sea shanty, Noddy comes up with an idea for how Scurvy's loud voice can help save the day. Clever Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Noddy's new music player starts a craze for the latest dance, the Toy Twist. He decides to have a big dance party that night! All his friends are excited apart from Smartysaurus, who can't dance. When the music player goes missing, Noddy must use all his investigative skills of listening, looking and following clues on the WhoWhatWhere Tablet to find out who has taken the music player and why. Eventually he realises that Smartysaurus borrowed the game so that she could practise the Toy Twist – but it's no good! She still can't master it! Noddy shows her how her own special Dinosaur Dance can make everyone's Toy Twist extra specially fun! Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Lion had lost his roar. Crocodile was snapping at all the animals in the Waterhole and Lion opened his big mouth but nothing came out! Tiny Flea tells Lion that if he dares to enter the Great Cave of Tinga Tinga then maybe he will find his roar. Lion plucks up courage and goes into the Great Cave. He roars with all his might, but a bigger roar comes back! Lion stands strong. He roars again and an even bigger roar comes back. Lion's very own Echo! He has found his roar! From that day on Lion always roars with pride, showing any beast who's the real King of Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: Zebra was once very easy to spot in Tinga Tinga as he was bright white all over. This very annoying as all he wanted was to be left alone to munch on yummy grass and get fat. One day, Eagle arrives at the Watering Hole with a new pair of sharp talons saying that she found them in the Great Cave. The animals excitedly rush to find something for themselves. Zebra accompanies Tortoise and the Monkeys into the Cave where they discover the last remaining item; a plain black coat. The Monkeys persuade Zebra to try it on. By holding in his stomach, Zebra manages to get the coat on but it is extremely tight and the black coat starts to rip. In fact, the more Zebra eats the more the coat rips until Zebra has a stripy black and white coat which he is extremely proud of. Not only that, his new stripes make him very difficult to spot amongst the tall grasses of the plains. Finally, Zebra can eat as much grass as he likes and not be spotted by the other animals!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat must deliver eggs, milk, flour and butter to Greendale for the annual Pancake Race. But when Michael mixes all the ingredients together, Pat finds that he instead has to deal with a mixing bowl full to the brim with pancake mix... Meanwhile in Greendale, Sara's attempts at pancake-tossing aren't going well and she soon loses her pancake under the wheels of PC Selby's car. Even worse, Ted Glen's amazing Pancake Machine has run out of mix so Sara won't be able to run the race unless Pat can get to Greendale on time... But Pat gets waylaid by Alf's cows and the pancake mix ends up all over the road. Pat hurries back to Pencaster but Michael now only has butter and flour so Pat has to go and get eggs from Nisha and even some milk from Rosie the goat! With the race about to start, Pat arrives just in time with all the ingredients necessary for Ted to make Sara a fresh pancake. SDS Mission accomplished!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat doesn't realise today's Special Delivery, a super all-in-one remote control, is quite as powerful as it is! As Jess falls asleep on the buttons, machines all around Pencaster start going haywire. Waiting for the remote, Charlie and Julian are installing a futuristic 'Shop a Bot 3000' robot sales assistant for Mrs Goggins, but they make the mistake of turning it on before the controller arrives. Pat struggles to make his delivery before the shop robot does too much damage!

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: A professional paper airplane thrower hires Archibald to be his caddie. While floating through the sky, Archibald bumps into birds who live in a blimp.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: Archibald stumbles upon a crime in progress while trapped in the mall overnight. A whale's tattooed map inspires Archibald to go on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening in Brickabuild. Clockwork Mouse is giving all sorts of confusing orders to the builders and everything is chaos. Noddy realises that someone has put sticky putty on her clockwork key and it's making her run slowly. Noddy decides to investigate and find out who could have tried to damage the little mouse. Following all the clues and keeping track of all the evidence in his WhoWhatWhere Tablet, Noddy finds that the trail leads him to Carlton! But Carlton adores Clockwork Mouse! Noddy discovers that poor Carlton didn't meant to damage her; he just wanted to help her rest and not work so hard. Noddy has a brilliant idea. If Clockwork Mouse and Carlton work together, they can get all their jobs finished in half the time. And then there'll be plenty of time to rest – and play! Good idea Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Something strange is happening in Toyland – trees are falling down and machines are going crazy. What's going on? Noddy needs to use all his investigating skills to find out who is causing all the accidents before someone gets hurt. He realises that Deltoid is trying to help and be a superhero but hasn't realised that his superstrength is causing chaos! Noddy shows him how to be a super helpful superhero without causing anymore accidents! Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Everyone is going to play Hide and Seek in Brickabuild but Fuse stops the game because someone has painted the big wall outside his workshop blue! What if they do it again? Or if they decide to paint the rest of Brickabuild? Noddy uses all his investigating skills of who, what, where, when, why and how to work out that the wall must have been painted by someone very tall who likes the colour blue. Smartysaurus! She admits she painted it so that she could be better at hide-and-seek! Noddy helps her to understand that she can play the game without having to cheat. Thank you Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Pirates are searching for the long-lost Fable Forest Gold. If they can't find it they might have to stop being pirates for good! Noddy leaps into action to help them. Using all his investigating skills, asking who, what, where, when, why and how and with the help of the wwwbook Noddy follows the clues and finds the gold! Now the pirates can stay in Toyland and hunt for treasure forever! Hurrah for Noddy!

Noddy realises that someone has put sticky putty on her clockwork key and it's making her run slowly. Noddy decides to investigate and find out who could have tried to damage the little mouse. Following all the clues and keeping track of all the evidence in his WhoWhatWhere Tablet, Noddy finds that the trail leads him to Carlton! But Carlton adores Clockwork Mouse! Noddy discovers that poor Carlton didn't meant to damage her; he just wanted to help her rest and not work so hard. Noddy has a brilliant idea. If Clockwork Mouse and Carlton work together, they can get all their jobs finished in half the time. And then there'll be plenty of time to rest – and play! Good idea Noddy!

programme.title: Bride For Rent
programme.desc: Adaptation of Philippine movie, Bride for Rent. Two unknown people decided to work together for a fake wedding to get the money they wanted.

programme.title: Recalled
programme.desc: A woman wakes up from an accident having lost her memory. She begins to have disturbing visions starting a desperate fight to uncover the truth about her past.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: The Hong Kong super-cop must stop a group of blackmailing bombers at the same time that the villains of the first Police Story are out for revenge

programme.title: The Master (2013)
programme.desc: When martial arts master Chen Xiang refuses to join the armies of the Qing Prince, his mother and his students are seized. To save them, Chen has only one path: all-out war.

programme.title: The Bachelors
programme.desc: After his wife's early death, a mourning father moves with his teenage son across the country for a private-school teaching job. Their lives begin to transform thanks to two unique women who help them embrace life and love again.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent Jun
programme.desc: An unsuccessful comic book artist runs into trouble after publishing a story containing real secrets from his former life as a NIS hitman

programme.title: Security
programme.desc: A security guard protects an eleven year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang for participating as a trial witness.

programme.title: Dragon Fist
programme.desc: A dishonored student of the Dragon Fist Sect seeks revenge for the death of his teacher.

programme.title: Project Silence
programme.desc: Silence takes place when an accident occurs on a foggy bridge and, as a result, an unknown beast is unleashed.

programme.title: New Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A fighter helps a woman protect her martial-arts school in World War II Taiwan.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America
programme.desc: A Chinese amnesiac and his companions confront cowboys and Indians in the American West.

programme.title: Husband Swap
programme.desc: Love at the first sight made a young couple get married. However, after their 5-year marriage, the husband began to find ways to make his wife actively break up with him.

programme.title: Stockholm
programme.desc: Based on the absurd but true 1973 bank heist and hostage crisis in Stockholm that was documented in the New Yorker as the origins of the 'Stockholm Syndrome‘, a condition in which hostages develop a psychological bond with their captors.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (S2)
programme.desc: In 2024 a tornado outbreak devastates the Central Plains. Trains flip, homes are torn apart, and a deadly night twister hurls debris onto a car.

programme.title: Exploring The Unknown With Wang Yibo (S1)
programme.desc: Relying on the desert movement and survival skills taught by experts, Wang Yibo goes to Birutu Peak in the Badain Jaran Desert in Inner Mongolia to watch the sunrise.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S7)
programme.desc: In a race against winter, Shawn extends his sluice to get more gold. Kris battles a bed of quartz and George enjoys a season-ending dive with his son.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S3)
programme.desc: Cody battles the dangers of dehydration searching for water and fire-making tools, while Joe gears up for mortal combat with aggressive feral boars.

programme.title: Reality Ranis Of The Jungle (S1)
programme.desc: As the series nears its climax, the queens gear up for the final race to camp. One queen secures a direct ticket to the Grand Finale with a standout performance.

programme.title: Expedition Files (S1)
programme.desc: A new study shows the Shroud of Turin could be real. Old ghost photos are analysed with new tools. The creator of the Georgia Guidestones is revealed.

programme.title: Expedition Files (S2)
programme.desc: What really caused the Salem Witch Trials? There are new questions about UFOs seen by top military, and who’s responsible for Rasputin’s murder?

programme.title: Lost Monster Files (S1)
programme.desc: An unknown apex predator is preying on orcas off the frozen coast of Kodiak, Alaska. Can the team identify the monster before it strikes again?

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S16)
programme.desc: An unexpected change in the Russian fishing industry shocks global crab markets, forcing the US to confront a turbulent past in preparation for competition.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S16)
programme.desc: As an Opilio biomass concentrates along the Russian line, the Dutch Harbor fleet must prepare for a winter season far to the north.

programme.title: Reality Ranis Of The Jungle (S1)
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode, a brutal survival challenge pushes two Ranis to their limits as they protect their supplies from fierce predators and harsh elements.

programme.title: Deadliest Bite
programme.desc: Using cutting edge technology, scientists unveil the secrets of rare shark species' jaws and delve into how these sharks deliver lethal attacks.

programme.title: The Americas (S1)
programme.desc: See new footage of fledgling pygmy owls, orca hunting, new species in flooded caves, and orchid bees filmed in incredible detail.

programme.title: Expedition Files (S2)
programme.desc: Is the Trojan War a myth, or more? Did Shakespeare really write Shakespeare? DNA finally reveals the ID of a body found on a beach over 80 years ago.

programme.title: Lost Monster Files (S1)
programme.desc: When Ozarks locals report frightening encounters with a mysterious, dragon-like beast, the team conducts their most ambitious hunt yet.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 70
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 7
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 8
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Pies
programme.desc: Guided by a pie-tastic team in Perth, Dr Karl embarks on a culinary odyssey to uncover how Australia's iconic meat pies are made.

programme.title: Grand Designs Transformations - South Yarra and Flemington
programme.desc: A little Melbourne workers' cottage gets a radical reimagining as a Mid Century Palm Springs oasis, while across town, a backyard shed is transformed into a Japanese bathhouse.

programme.title: Dream Gardens - Kyneton, VIC
programme.desc: A couple ask their son and daughter-in-law to create a unique garden in Kyneton in Victoria. But do they have the courage to embrace a design that will transform their bland backyard into a striking sculptural showcase?

programme.title: Australia: An Unofficial History - Cracks in the Facade
programme.desc: Explores films from the 1970s to tell the story of Australia as never seen before.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 70
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Stephanie Alexander
programme.desc: Aussie food icon, Stephanie Alexander is in the kitchen to show off her mum's famous rabbit pie.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 10
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 98
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: Van Helsing

programme.title: Home In Toa Payoh - EP 9 家在大巴窑
programme.desc: Baomei, Pengkun and Guocheng are childhood friends from Toa Payoh. Baomei is a thrifty bachelor and factory foreman. Pengkun, a skilled technician, often sneaks off early to be with his family. Guocheng is a successful insurance salesman with a loving yet nagging wife. Together, they and their families deal with the gossipy, quarrelsome Auntie Fen and her frequent clashes with Guocheng’s father-in-law.

Kah Choi recommends Mr. Cai, but he was not keen. He asks Jiachang to donate too, and Jiachang sneers at Haonan to make it difficult for him. Kah Choi privately hints to Haonan to adapt to the circumstances, hinting that he will give the outpatient clinic up.

programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 20 一路惊魂
programme.desc: Nick accuses Y of breaking his word and sending the video of his affair with Rebecca to Jane despite receiving the 10 Bitcoins he had demanded. When Y reveals he didn’t do it for the money, Nick realises why Y has that video in the first place. It turns out that Y and Rebecca used to be a couple. He got upset at Nick for sleeping with Rebecca and set his sights on Jane to get back at Nick.
